title: centaurea helenioides
intro: Centaurea helenioides, also known as White Cockle or Mountain Cornflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea helenioides include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Centaurea helenioides can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in treating various health conditions.
